commit.message:
BrewPad v1.6.0 — performance polish (compositor animation, chart memoization, auto-save, event delegation)

- Item 2: .bp-wl-bar switches from height% to scaleY(0..1); transform-origin:center bottom keeps GPU compositor path, eliminates layout on animation
- Item 3: _chartCache memoizes renderPlatoChart() SVG per batchId+readingCount+lastTimestamp; invalidated on selectBatch() and reading submission
- Item 1: Save Tasks / Save All buttons removed; checkbox change auto-saves after 1.5s debounce per taskId (_taskSaveTimers map); optimistic UI toggles row class; reverts + error toast on failure
- Item 4: Six querySelectorAll binding loops replaced with single delegated listeners on stable ancestors (#bp-dashboard-inner, #bp-batch-list-pane, #bp-tasks-inner, #bp-measurements-inner, #bp-batch-detail-pane); wired once in initDelegation() from DOMContentLoaded

fix(devpod): use ../:/workspace volume mount

Volume mount needs ../ to reach the actual repo root.

commit.message:
Claude/enable agent teams m bs om (#127)

* feat: redesign live trading dashboard UI with improved layout and styling

Overhaul the dashboard HTML/CSS with better color variables, cleaner layout,
and enhanced visual hierarchy for the trading interface.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* feat: add live status dashboard to GitHub Pages

- Create docs/live.html — polls docs/data/live_stats.json every 30s
  showing real-time bot status, price, trades, decisions, modifiers
- Update publish_stats.py to write to docs/data/ instead of Website/data/
  so GitHub Pages can serve the live data
- Add "Live" nav link to docs/index.html
- Seed docs/data/live_stats.json with current data

Now when publish_stats.py runs locally alongside the bot, it pushes
sanitized stats to GitHub every 60s, and the live page auto-refreshes.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* feat: HTF historical backfill + modifier engine fix (defaults to 1.0, static FOMC calendar)

- HTF engine backfilled with historical bars on startup (IBKR or synthetic)
- All HTF timeframes (1m-1D) fed through HTFBiasEngine for immediate bias
- HAR-RV forecaster initialized from 180 days of daily bars
- Overnight modifier seeded with previous day close from historical data
- All modifier defaults changed from 0.0 to 1.0 (never zeros out sizing)
- Gamma modifier fallback explicitly returns 1.0 with detail keys
- InstitutionalModifierEngine stores _last_result for dashboard access
- Trade decision logger default modifier_values: 1.0 not 0.0
- Timestamps (HH:MM:SS ET) added to live stats recent decisions
- docs/live.html TIME column added to Recent Decisions table
- Historical bars stored in logs/historical_bars_{tf}.json for dashboard

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* feat: tiered GEX refresh — 5min idle, 2min active, 1min preflight

Replace fixed 15-min REFRESH_INTERVAL_SECONDS with three tiered intervals
based on trading state:
- REFRESH_INTERVAL_IDLE (300s) — no position, confluence < 0.65
- REFRESH_INTERVAL_ACTIVE (120s) — position open
- REFRESH_INTERVAL_PREFLIGHT (60s) — confluence > 0.65, entry imminent

GEXMonitor.update() now accepts urgency parameter ("idle"/"active"/"preflight").
run_paper_live.py determines urgency from position state and last confluence
score on each bar before calling update().

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

* chore: commit pre-existing branch changes

Include uncommitted work already present on the feature branch:
- .gitignore updates
- Dashboard server and live dashboard updates
- Publish stats improvements
- Institutional modifiers and volatility forecast enhancements
- Test updates for gamma regime and volatility forecast
- New test files for GEX monitor and HAR-RV upgrade

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TR4Tq47EwmgGBdCz3UMXAR

feat: add email campaign workflow — AI-generated email series with inline editor and HTML export

Adds a complete email campaign workflow for generating multi-email series
using AI. Users select a brand kit + messaging framework, configure campaign
brief (purpose, frequency, email types, urgency), and generate a series of
emails. Each email includes heading image prompt, introduction, body, CTA
button, and signature. Emails are editable inline with live preview and
exportable as standalone HTML for any EDM platform.

New tables: email_campaigns, email_campaign_emails (with RLS policies)
New AI agent: email-agent (builds strategic email series from framework)
New API routes: CRUD for email campaigns, emails, generation, and HTML export
New UI: wizard page, campaign detail/timeline, and split-pane email editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Upgrade chunker for real-world file uploads

core/chunker.py now handles 12 format categories:
- ZIP/TAR archives: extract + recurse into each file
- PDF: text extraction via pypdf (graceful fallback)
- Images: metadata chunk with needs_ocr flag
- SQL dumps: schema extraction only (CREATE TABLE), skip data
- SQLite/DB files: catalog tables, columns, row counts (no data)
- DOCX: text from XML (python-docx optional)
- XLSX: sheet data as CSV (openpyxl optional)
- JSON/YAML: structured chunking
- Code files: function/class boundary splitting
- Markdown/CSV/text: existing handlers preserved

Design principle: databases get cataloged, not copied. The hive
knows ABOUT the data without HAVING the data.

Also adds start.sh for clean boot and pypdf to requirements.txt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Can be saved as PDF from browser print dialog (Cmd+P)

commit.message:
Fix join party code lookup to be case-insensitive

Codes are stored as 'p-XXXX' (lowercase prefix) but .toUpperCase()
converted the entire input to 'P-XXXX', causing no match. Use ilike
for case-insensitive comparison instead.

fix(duckdb): store timestamps as BIGINT to prevent reload data loss (#31)

Replace TIMESTAMP column with BIGINT (epoch ms) to avoid Parquet
round-trip ambiguity in DuckDB-WASM. Adds migration for existing
OPFS data stored in old TIMESTAMP format.

Closes #30

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(helm): add charset utf-8 to nginx config for Korean support

Without explicit charset, nginx serves text/html without charset=utf-8,
causing Korean characters (한글) to display as garbled text in browsers.

feat: bottom action bar mobile estilo Chatwoot — ações acessíveis com polegar

Substitui o dropdown ⋮ (MoreVertical) do header por uma barra de ações
inferior (bottom bar) que aparece somente no mobile quando uma conversa
está aberta. Ergonomia muito melhor para uso com polegar.

Bottom bar com botões grandes:
- 🤖 IA On/Off (toggle direto)
- 📋 Ficha (só trabalhista, abre slide-over)
- ✅ Aceitar (só status WAITING)
- ↗️ Transferir (abre modal)
- ⋮ Mais (abre painel com ações secundárias)

Painel "Mais" (sobe da barra) inclui:
- Área jurídica (info)
- Etapa do Funil CRM (seletor com todos os stages)
- Enviar Formulário / Visualizar Ficha
- Devolver ao SDR / Manter Aqui
- Fechar Conversa

Header mobile simplificado: apenas ← Voltar + Avatar + Nome + badges
(dot de IA + badge de área + badge ficha finalizada).

Desktop inalterado — zero regressão.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(db): drop 4 duplicate indexes on posting_enrichments (#297) (#317)

* fix(db): drop 4 duplicate indexes on posting_enrichments (#297)

Migration cc45d3e4f5a6 created plural-named indexes (ix_posting_enrichments_*)
and migration 1e78ab9cd012 later created singular-named equivalents
(ix_posting_enrichment_*) to match model __table_args__. Both sets coexisted,
doubling write overhead on every posting_enrichments INSERT/UPDATE.

Drops the older plural-named duplicates:
- ix_posting_enrichments_brand_id
- ix_posting_enrichments_retailer_id
- ix_posting_enrichments_market_id
- ix_posting_enrichments_posting_id

Downgrade recreates them via CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: correct down_revision to point to actual head (c3d4e5f6a7b9)

Fixes Cursor Bugbot finding — previous value 7d1276046127 already had
child migrations (entity_count → alerts), which would create multiple
Alembic heads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: schema-qualify index DDL in migration

Add public. prefix to index and table names in DROP/CREATE INDEX
statements to ensure correct schema targeting regardless of
connection search_path.

commit.message:
fix: PDF 텍스트 겹침 근본 수정 - heightOfString 대신 doc.y 사용

한글 폰트에서 heightOfString()가 실제 렌더링 높이보다 낮게
측정되어 누적 오차로 텍스트가 겹치는 문제 해결.
렌더링 후 PDFKit의 내부 커서 위치(doc.y)를 사용하여
정확한 y 좌표 추적. 페이지 넘김 예측용 heightOfString에는
+8pt 안전 마진 추가.
